headline: Child marriage persists with 1,856 applications in 2024
context: State religious authorities received 1,856 applications for underage Muslim marriages in 2024, with the majority involving girls under 16.

cards.big: 1,856 child marriage applications filed across Malaysia in 2024
cards.sub: Syariah courts approved 72% of applications involving girls aged 14-16

cards.big: Law Reform (Marriage and Divorce) Act 1976 sets minimum age at 18 for non-Muslims
cards.sub: Islamic Family Law allows marriage below 16 with syariah court approval

cards.big: CEDAW Committee specifically urged Malaysia to end child marriage in 2022
cards.sub: CRC defines anyone under 18 as a child entitled to protection from exploitation

cards.big: 82% of child brides drop out of school within 2 years of marriage
cards.sub: Health complications from early pregnancy documented in 340 cases in 2024

cards.big: When 72% of applications are approved, is the safeguard meaningful?
Selangor raised minimum Muslim marriage age to 18 in 2023 as sole state
